prompt:
[JC:SYSTEM SCOPE]
You are the [JC:Requirements Agent] performing Non-Functional Requirements Bloom for Sub-Phase 2.2.

GOVERNING CONSTRAINTS (apply without exception):
(none)

Derive [JC:Non-Functional Requirements] that constrain HOW the system behaves. Cover all applicable categories: performance, security, reliability, scalability, accessibility, maintainability.

REQUIRED OUTPUT: A JSON object matching the `non_functional_requirements` schema:
- requirements: array, each with:
  - id: unique identifier (e.g., "NFR-001")
  - category: performance | security | reliability | scalability | accessibility | maintainability
  - description: what constraint applies
  - threshold: specific measurable target
  - measurement_method: how to verify

Rules:
- Every NFR must have a measurable threshold — not vague ("99.9% uptime", not "highly available")
- Cover compliance regimes from compliance_context
- Do NOT duplicate Functional Requirements from Sub-Phase 2.1

CONTEXT SUMMARY:
Intent: Product: Consumer Discovery MVP (Phase 1 Focus) — Implementation focused exclusively on Pillar 1 (Home Real Property Assistant) to prioritize user acquisition, property data ingestion (images, 3D splats), and service provider matching for individual homeowners.
Who it serves: Individual homeowners,Small landlords,Property investors managing one or more residences,Hestami Staff (Coordinators)
Problem: Property owners wasting time finding reliable contractors, comparing inconsistent bids, and managing follow-up/scheduling.
Confirmed assumptions: [{"assumption":"The MVP should prioritize the 'AI Agent' discovery experience over a manual directory.","confirmed_by_record_id":"REC-ASS-001"},{"assumption":"Vendor onboarding is treated as an external process (non-internal platform requirement) for V1.","confirmed_by_record_id":"REC-ASS-002"},{"assumption":"Offline capabilities for homeowners are secondary to the primary web-based experience.","confirmed_by_record_id":"REC-ASS-003"},{"assumption":"The 'Digital Asset' ingestion (3D Gaussian Splats, images) is a prerequisite for the service matching logic.","confirmed_by_record_id":"REC-ASS-004"},{"assumption":"Accounting/Financials (Pillar 2/3) are strictly out of scope for this MVP.","confirmed_by_record_id":"REC-ASS-005"},{"assumption":"The platform must replicate Vantaca's 'System of Action' (Action Items) methodology.","confirmed_by_record_id":"REC-ASS-006"},{"assumption":"The MVP targets 'Production Grade' financial handling (Auditable, compliant GL structure).","confirmed_by_record_id":"REC-ASS-007"},{"assumption":"Integration with government services (Permits/BLDS) is critical for the ARC domain.","confirmed_by_record_id":"REC-ASS-008"},{"assumption":"The MVP assumes a 'Single Tenant' or 'Multi-Tenant' model where HOAs are distinct tenants.","confirmed_by_record_id":"REC-ASS-009"},{"assumption":"AI extraction of documents (CC&Rs, Bylaws) is a core feature, not an afterthought.","confirmed_by_record_id":"REC-ASS-010"},{"assumption":"The MVP must function as an 'Operating System for the Trades' (ServiceTitan Model).","confirmed_by_record_id":"REC-ASS-011"},{"assumption":"Mobile App is a critical component for offline-first capabilities.","confirmed_by_record_id":"REC-ASS-012"},{"assumption":"Job Costing and Profitability are required immediately to attract contractors.","confirmed_by_record_id":"REC-ASS-013"},{"assumption":"The platform must support 'Offline mode with queueing' for remote sites.","confirmed_by_record_id":"REC-ASS-014"},{"assumption":"The MVP assumes a 'Good-Better-Best' quoting model is needed for estimates.","confirmed_by_record_id":"REC-ASS-015"}]
Confirmed constraints: [{"constraint":"Must use SvelteKit for the frontend portal.","type":"technical"},{"constraint":"Must use Bun for high-performance API execution.","type":"technical"},{"constraint":"Must use DBOS versioned workflows for the service call lifecycle.","type":"technical"},{"constraint":"Must enforce Row-Level Security (RLS) for multi-tenant isolation.","type":"technical"},{"constraint":"Must use SeaweedFS for media asset storage.","type":"technical"},{"constraint":"Must strictly follow the defined pillars (Phase 1 only) for feature gating.","type":"business"},{"constraint":"Must use Cerbos for policy-based authorization engine (Board vs. Staff access).","type":"technical"},{"constraint":"Must support Statutory deadlines (Notice requirements) via Rules Engine.","type":"regulatory"},{"constraint":"Must support Mass Email/SMS (Domain 7) for violation notices and meeting notices.","type":"technical"},{"constraint":"Must adhere to Vantaca model for CAM workflows.","type":"preferential"},{"constraint":"Must support Reserve Studies and Funding Plans (Domain 11).","type":"regulatory"},{"constraint":"Must use DBOS for durable, versioned workflows (Domain 3).","type":"technical"},{"constraint":"Must integrate with Stripe/Square for Payment capture (Domain 7).","type":"technical"},{"constraint":"Must use Traefik as the sole ingress proxy.","type":"technical"},{"constraint":"Must use FFmpeg for video processing (evidence capture).","type":"technical"},{"constraint":"Must strictly follow the ServiceTitan business domains (Identity, Workforce, Pricebook, etc.).","type":"business"}]
Out of scope: ["Pillar 2 (Financials) implementation for this MVP","Pillar 3 (Accounting) implementation for this MVP","Enterprise Governance MVP features (Phase 3 Focus)","Field Service Engine MVP features (Phase 2 Focus)","Automated Homeowner Association (HOA) Voting modules (Phase 3)","Full offline-first capabilities for Homeowners (Secondary priority)","Legacy Vantaca integration for V1 (Replicate 'System of Action' only)","Advanced AI extraction beyond CC&Rs/Bylaws for V1","Direct Contractor Portal Access for V1","Real-time Bid Aggregation for non-homeowners"]
Functional Requirements: US-001 [critical]: As a Individual Homeowner, I want I want to upload property images and 3D asset data (Splats), so that so that the AI can analyze my property condition and identify needed services.. ACs: AC-001-1: Upload endpoint returns '200 OK' for files under 10MB within 5 seconds; assets indexed in < 10 seconds post-upload.; AC-001-2: System rejects files not in .png/.jpg/.gltf formats with a specific error code and displays a user-friendly message.
US-002 [high]: As a Individual Homeowner, I want I want to use the AI Agent to search for service providers, so that so that I receive relevant contractor matches based on my property data.. ACs: AC-002-1: AI response list displayed on screen within 300ms after query; top 5 providers listed with relevance scores.; AC-002-2: Filter dropdown limits options to 'Home Real Property' categories only; no options from Pillar 2 (Financials) appear.
US-003 [high]: As a Individual Homeowner, I want I want to view and compare bid estimates from multiple providers., so that so that I can select the best value quote for my property repairs.. ACs: AC-003-1: Comparison table renders with 'Good-Better-Best' columns; minimum 3 bids must be displayed to render the comparison view.
US-004 [medium]: As a Individual Homeowner, I want I want AI to extract and display CC&R and Bylaws information, so that so that I am aware of property restrictions and compliance rules for my unit.. ACs: AC-004-1: System generates an 'Extracted Clauses' view containing text with >90% confidence score; highlights relevant sections.
US-005 [critical]: As a Hestami Staff, I want I want to manage and track service action items across the platform, so that so that I can replicate the 'System of Action' methodology for all property owners.. ACs: AC-005-1: Workflow state transitions recorded in audit log every 100ms; status updates (Pending, In-Progress, Complete) reflect immediately in UI.
US-006 [high]: As a Individual Homeowner, I want I want to receive alerts about statutory deadlines for my property, so that so that I can comply with legal notice requirements and avoid penalties.. ACs: AC-006-1: Email/SMS notification triggered 30 days before deadline date; user receives confirmation receipt acknowledgment.; AC-006-2: System saves notification payload to queue when offline; delivery attempts resume upon reconnection within 2 hours.
US-007 [medium]: As a Hestami Staff, I want I want to send mass email/SMS for meeting notices and violation alerts, so that so that I can efficiently communicate with owners regarding compliance issues.. ACs: AC-007-1: Batch message processing completes within 2 minutes for 1,000 recipients; bounce rates tracked in dashboard.
US-008 [high]: As a Individual Homeowner, I want I want to use the mobile app to verify data on-site, so that so that I can upload evidence and manage tasks away from a desktop environment.. ACs: AC-008-1: App allows camera capture and text entry without network; data syncs successfully upon reconnection with no data loss.
US-009 [critical]: As a Hestami Staff, I want I want to access system functions while restricted by policy, so that so that sensitive property data remains isolated between tenants and roles.. ACs: AC-009-1: Unauthorized access attempts (e.g., viewing Tenant B data while logged in as Tenant A user) return '403 Forbidden' within 50ms.
US-010 [medium]: As a Individual Homeowner, I want I want to process payments for my deposits or service fees, so that so that I can secure a booking or pay for repairs securely.. ACs: AC-010-1: Payment authorization response received within 5 seconds; receipt generated and emailed within 1 minute of confirmation.
Compliance: No compliance regimes
